sentences: To reconnect means to connect again or differently. To meet up again (with someone), after a long time apart and/or without communication; to reunite. 重新連接意味著再次連接或以不同的方式連接。在長時間分開和/或沒有溝通後再次（與某人）見面；重聚。

Is there any way I can get you to reconsider selling your car? 有什麼辦法可以讓您重新考慮出售您的汽車嗎？
To reconsider means to consider a matter again. 重新考慮是指重新考慮某件事。
To reconstruct means to construct again; to restore. 重建意味著重新建構；恢復。
People may reconstruct in different situations depending on the context. 人們可能會根據上下文在不同的情況下進行重建。

meaning: 將某物恢復到較早狀態的行為。
sentences: The reconstruction of the medieval bridge began last year. 這座中世紀橋樑的重建工作於去年開始。
The term reconstruction refers to The act of restoring something to an earlier state. 重建一詞是指將某物恢復到較早狀態的行為。
The athlete broke the world record in the hundred-meter race. 該運動員打破了百米賽跑的世界紀錄。
Please keep a record of all your travel expenses for the trip. 請記錄旅行中所有的差旅花費。
He used a digital voice recorder to record the entire interview. 他使用數位語音錄音機錄下了整個採訪過程。
She has been learning how to play the recorder since primary school. 她從小學起就在學習如何彈奏直笛。

meaning: 將聲音、視訊等儲存在永久媒體中的行為。
sentences: The one-party consent law permits the recording of telephone calls with the consent of at least one of the parties. 一方同意法允許在至少一方同意的情況下對電話進行錄音。
The term recording refers to The act of storing sound, video, etc., in a permanent medium. 術語「錄製」是指將聲音、視訊等儲存在永久媒體中的行為。
The old man recounted the tale of how he caught the big fish. 老人講述了他如何捕到大魚的故事。
To recount means to tell; narrate; to relate in detail. 敘述意味著講述；敘事;詳細聯繫。

meaning: 一次回頭，或再一次；更新課程；返回;撤退;復發。
sentences: The term recourse refers to a coursing back, or coursing again; renewed course; return; retreat; recurrence. 「追索權」一詞指的是「追回」或「再次追回」；更新課程；返回;撤退;復發。
The lesson introduced recourse as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了追索權這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
I hope you recover quickly and can come back to work soon. 我希望你早日康復，並能很快回到工作崗位。
It took several months for the economy to recover from the crisis. 經濟花了幾個月才從危機中恢復過來。
The doctor said that her full recovery from the surgery would take several months. 醫生說她手術後的完全康復（痊癒）需要幾個月的時間。
The economy is showing signs of a slow but steady recovery after the crisis. 危機過後，經濟正顯示出緩慢但穩定的復甦（恢復）跡象。

meaning: 給予新的生命、能量或鼓勵；使煥然一新、充滿活力。
sentences: To recreate means to give new life, energy or encouragement (to); to refresh, enliven. 重新創造意味著給予新的生命、能量或鼓勵；使煥然一新、充滿活力。
People may recreate in different situations depending on the context. 人們可能會根據上下文在不同的情況下進行重建。
Reading and gardening are my favorite forms of recreation during the weekend. 閱讀和園藝是我週末最喜歡的娛樂（消遣）方式。
The city park provides various facilities for public recreation and sports. 城市公園為大眾娛樂和運動提供了多種設施。
The city provides various recreational facilities, such as parks and pools. 城市提供多種娛樂（消遣）設施，如公園和游泳池。
Hiking and swimming are popular recreational activities for young people. 健行和游泳是年輕人喜愛的消遣活動。
The company is looking to recruit several new software engineers next month. 公司正尋求在下個月招募幾名新的軟體工程師。
The army sent a team to small villages to recruit new soldiers for the service. 軍隊派了一個小組到各村莊徵募（招募）新兵。

meaning: 新兵代理名詞；招募人員的人，尤其是受僱招募他人的人。
sentences: The army recruiter promised that I'd see the world and learn useful skills if I enlisted. 徵兵人員承諾，如果我入伍，我會見識一下這個世界，並學到有用的技能。
The term recruiter refers to agent noun of recruit; one who recruits, particularly one employed to recruit others. 招募人員一詞是指招募的代理名詞；招募人員的人，尤其是受僱招募他人的人。

meaning: 尋找組織職位候選人或武裝部隊新兵的過程或藝術。
sentences: The term recruitment refers to the process or art of finding candidates for a post in an organization, or recruits for the armed forces. 「招募」一詞是指為組織中的職位尋找候選人或為武裝部隊招募新兵的過程或藝術。
The lesson introduced recruitment as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了招募這個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 屬於、經由直腸或與直腸相關。
sentences: The customs inspector subjected him to a rectal exam. 海關檢查員對他進行了直腸檢查。
The report describes the result as rectal. 報告將結果描述為直腸。
A standard sheet of paper has the shape of a large rectangle. 一張標準紙張的大致形狀是一個大長方形。
Please draw a rectangle around the correct answer on the form. 請在表格上的正確答案周圍畫一個長方形。
rectangular bench 長方形長椅
rectangular grid 長方形網格

meaning: 補救或解決（不良的事態、情況等）。
sentences: to rectify the crisis 糾正危機
To rectify means to remedy or fix (an undesirable state of affairs, situation etc.). 糾正是指補救或修復（不良的事態、情況等）。

meaning: 在英國聖公會教堂中，負責教區並擁有該教區什一稅的神職人員。
sentences: The term rector refers to in the Anglican Church, a cleric in charge of a parish and who owns the tithes of it. 教區長一詞在聖公會中指的是負責教區並擁有該教區什一稅的神職人員。
The lesson introduced rector as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了「rector」這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 重複出現的實例；頻繁發生。
sentences: The term recurrence refers to the instance of recurring; frequent occurrence. 術語「重複」是指重複發生的情況；頻繁發生。
The lesson introduced recurrence as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了復發作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 重複出現；一次又一次地發生。
sentences: The patient complained of recurrent chest pain. 患者主訴反覆出現胸痛。
Something described as recurrent is recurring; happening time after time. 被描述為反覆發生的事情就是反覆發生；一次又一次地發生。
She has a recurring dream about flying. 她反覆做著一個關於飛翔的夢。
The project faced several recurring problems. 該專案面臨幾個反覆出現的問題。

meaning: 繪製 自身，向後引用。
sentences: The recursive nature of stories which borrow from each other 相互借用的故事的 遞歸 本質 相互借用的故事的遞歸本質
The report describes the result as recursive. 該報告將結果描述為遞歸的。 該報告將結果描述為遞歸的。 該報告將結果描述為下降的。
We should all make an effort to recycle paper, plastic, and glass bottles. 我們都應該努力回收紙類、塑料和玻璃瓶。
The company uses recycled materials to make their environmentally friendly products. 該公司使用回收材料來製造環保產品。
She wore a stunning red dress to the gala dinner. 她穿了一件亮麗的紅洋裝參加正式晚宴。
The red light means you must stop your car immediately. 紅燈表示你必須立即停車。

meaning: 透過買回某物來恢復其所有權。
sentences: To redeem means to recover ownership of something by buying it back. 贖回意味著透過買回某物來恢復其所有權。
People may redeem in different situations depending on the context. 人們可能會根據具體情況在不同情況下進行救贖。

meaning: 給（一個字）一個新的或不同的定義。
sentences: To redefine means to give a new or different definition to (a word). 重新定義意味著給（一個字）一個新的或不同的定義。
People may redefine in different situations depending on the context. 人們可能會根據上下文在不同情況下重新定義。

meaning: 贖回的行為或贖回的東西。
sentences: The term redemption refers to the act of redeeming or something redeemed. 救贖一詞是指救贖的行為或被救贖的東西。
The lesson introduced redemption as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了救贖作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 佈置或規劃先前佈置或計劃的事物的新版本。
sentences: To redesign means to lay out or plan a new version of something previously laid out or planned. 重新設計意味著佈置或規劃先前佈置或計劃的事物的新版本。
People may redesign in different situations depending on the context. 人們可能會根據上下文在不同情況下重新設計。

meaning: 重新開發某事物的過程。
sentences: the redevelopment of the hero's character in a comic book 漫畫中英雄人物的重新塑造
The term redevelopment refers to The process of developing something anew. 「再開發」一詞是指重新開發某些東西的過程。

meaning: 北美鴨（Aythya americana）作為獵鳥而備受推崇。
sentences: The term redhead refers to a North American duck (Aythya americana) highly esteemed as a game bird. 紅髮鴨這個字指的是一種北美鴨（Aythya americana），被高度評價為一種獵鳥。
The lesson introduced redhead as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了紅髮女郎作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 給予新的方向，改變方向。
sentences: redirect output to /dev/null 將輸出重定向到/dev/null
To redirect means to give new direction to, change the direction of. 重定向意味著給予新方向、改變方向。

meaning: 再次發現；尤其是以前遺失或遺忘的東西。
sentences: She rediscovered her faith in religion. 她重新發現了對宗教的信仰。
People often rediscover when the situation calls for it. 人們經常在情況需要時重新發現。
The redistribution of wealth between the rich and poor has been tried many times. 富人和窮人之間的財富再分配已經被多次嘗試。
The term redistribution refers to The act of changing the distribution of resources. 術語「重新分配」是指改變資源分配的行為。
The teacher asked him to redo his homework. 老師要求他重做作業。
We decided to redo the kitchen next summer. 我們決定明年夏天重新裝修廚房。
We need to redouble our efforts to finish the project on time. 我們需要加倍努力以準時完成專案。
The team redoubled its energy after the half-time break. 中場休息後，球隊加強了勁頭。
We should all try to reduce our usage of single-use plastic. 我們都應該努力減少一次性塑料的使用。
The new system will help to reduce the overall operational costs. 新系統將有助於降低整體的營運成本。

meaning: 變成 更小 或 更少 ；經歷了 減少。
sentences: the reduced prices in a summer sale 夏季促銷 降價 夏季促銷 夏季降價
The report describes the result as reduced. 報告將結果描述為減少。 報告將結果描述為減少。 報告將結果描述為減少。
The company announced a significant reduction in its workforce this year. 該公司宣布今年將大幅削減（減少）其勞動力。
You can get a further reduction in price if you pay for the goods in cash. 如果你用現金付款，價格可以進一步降低（折扣）。
The company announced a series of redundancies following the economic crisis. 公司在經濟危機後宣佈了一連串的裁員。
The new software is designed to eliminate data redundancy and save space. 這款新軟體旨在消除數據冗餘並節省空間。
Four employees were made redundant. 四名員工被裁員。
Something described as redundant is dismissed from employment because no longer needed. 被描述為多餘的人因不再需要而被解僱。
This redwood deck will last forever. 這款 紅木 甲板將永遠持續下去。 這個紅木甲板將永遠持續下去。 這個紅木甲板將永遠持續下去。
The term redwood refers to A tree of the species Sequoia sempervirens. 紅木一詞指的是 該物種的樹 Sequoia sempervirens 。 紅杉一詞是指紅杉屬的樹。 紅木是指該物種的樹Sequoia sempervirens 。

meaning: 反芻動物的第四個胃；凝乳酵素。
sentences: The term reed refers to The fourth stomach of a ruminant; rennet. 蘆葦一詞指的是反芻動物的第四個胃；凝乳酵素。
We learned the meaning of reed during today's lesson. 在今天的課程中我們學習了蘆葦的意思。
The Great Barrier Reef is home to a wide variety of colorful corals and fish. 大堡礁是各式各樣彩色珊瑚和魚類的家園。
The ship was badly damaged after hitting a hidden reef near the coast. 船撞上岸邊的暗礁後嚴重受損。
He wound the fishing line onto the reel. 他把釣魚線繞在捲軸上。
The news left her reeling with shock. 這個消息讓她震驚得不知所措。
Please refer to the instruction manual if you have any questions about the machine. 如果你對這台機器有任何疑問，請參考（查閱）說明書。
The doctor decided to refer the patient to a specialist for further tests. 醫生決定將病人轉介給專科醫生進行進一步檢查。
The referee made several controversial decisions during the football match. 裁判在足球比賽中做出了幾項具爭議的判決。
She asked her former professor to act as a referee for her job application. 她請以前的教授擔任她求職申請的推薦人（介紹人）。
He made a brief reference to the incident during his speech but didn't go into detail. 他在演講中簡短地提到了（參考了）那次事件，但沒有詳述細節。
You will need to provide at least two professional references for your job application. 你的工作申請需要提供至少兩份專業推薦人（參考資料）。
The country held a national referendum to decide on the new policy. 該國舉行了全國公民投票來決定這項新政策。
The results of the referendum show a strong support for democratic principles. 公投結果顯示大眾對民主原則的強烈支持。

meaning: 將某人或某物轉移給另一人、透過參考發送或轉介的行為或過程。
sentences: The insurance company insists I get a referral from my regular doctor. I can't just go to the specialist; a GP has got to refer me. 保險公司堅持要求我從我的常規醫生那裡得到推薦。我不能只去看專科醫生；一位全科醫生必須推薦我。
The term referral refers to the act or process of transferring someone or something to another, of sending by reference, or referring. 術語「推薦」是指將某人或某物轉移給另一個人、透過參考發送或轉介的行為或過程。

meaning: 用於補充或替換某物的東西。以優惠的價格提供額外的食物或飲料。
sentences: Today it is $2 for a coffee, with free refills throughout the day. 現在一杯咖啡的價格為 2 美元，全天免費續杯。
Tank's empty. We need to go for a refill. 水箱空了。我們需要去補充一下。
Oil is refined into gasoline at the refinery. 原油在煉油廠被提煉成汽油。
He spent years trying to refine his technique. 他花了多年時間試圖完善自己的技術。
The company is looking for ways to refine its manufacturing process. 公司正在尋找精鍊（改善）其生產流程的方法。
The painting shows a high level of artistic refinement and detail. 這幅畫展現了極高的藝術修養（優雅）和細節處理。

meaning: 精確，沒有不精確，特別是： 睿智，有時過於微妙或假裝睿智。微妙、謹慎、深思熟慮。
sentences: The argument, while not persuasive, is quite refined. 這個論點雖然沒有說服力，但相當精煉。
The curriculum has been carefully refined to meet the needs of foreign students. 課程經過精心完善，以滿足外國學生的需求。

meaning: 行為，或提煉的結果；去除雜質或純化材料。
sentences: The term refinement refers to the act, or the result of refining; the removal of impurities, or a purified material. 精煉一詞是指精煉的行為或結果；去除雜質或純化材料。
The lesson introduced refinement as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了細化作為一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 用於生產糖、石油或金屬等精煉產品的建築或大量機械。
sentences: The term refinery refers to a building, or a mass of machinery, used to produce refined products such as sugar, oil, or metals. 煉油廠一詞是指用於生產糖、油或金屬等精煉產品的建築物或大量機械。
The lesson introduced refinery as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了煉油廠作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
The calm surface of the lake reflected the surrounding mountains perfectly. 平靜的湖面完美地倒映（反射）出周圍的山巒。
After the project finished, we took some time to reflect on what we had learned. 專案結束後，我們花了一些時間來反思（思考）我們學到了什麼。

meaning: 彎曲或發回（尤其是入射的聲音或光）。
sentences: reflected light or reflected heat 反射光或反射熱
The report describes the result as reflected. 該報告描述了所反映的結果。
She stared at her own reflection in the mirror for a long time. 她對著鏡子裡自己的影像（倒影）凝視了良久。
The survey results are a clear reflection of public opinion on the new policy. 調查結果清楚地反映（體現）了大眾對新政策的意見。
The moon's reflective light illuminated the calm surface of the lake. 月亮的反射光照亮了平靜的湖面。
She was in a reflective mood, pondering her future plans and dreams. 她正處於沈思的心境中，思索著未來的計畫與夢想。

meaning: 反射或由反射產生的影像；光線從照明表面反射到陰影表面。
sentences: A reflex camera uses a mirror to reflect the image onto a ground-glass viewfinder. 反射相機使用鏡子將影像反射到磨砂玻璃觀景窗上。
The term reflex refers to a reflection or an image produced by a reflection; the light reflected from an illuminated surface to one in shade. 術語「反射」是指反射或由反射產生的影像；光線從照明表面反射到陰影表面。

meaning: 屬於反射或由反射引起的。
sentences: The electric shock elicited an automatic and reflexive response from him. 電擊引起了他本能的、條件反射的反應。
The report describes the result as reflexive. 該報告將這一結果描述為反射性的。
The government is planning to implement major reforms in the healthcare system. 政府計畫在醫療保健系統中實施重大改革。
He promised to reform the company's management structure to improve efficiency. 他承諾要改革（改進）公司的管理結構以提高效率。

meaning: 衡平法院對書面文件進行變更或更正，以符合當事人的原意。
sentences: The term reformation refers to change or correction, by a court in equity, to a written instrument to conform to the original intention of the parties. 重整一詞是指衡平法院對書面文件進行變更或更正，以符合當事人的原意。
The lesson introduced reformation as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了改革這個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 性格和生活都得到了改觀。
sentences: a reformed gambler / drunkard / alcoholic / criminal 改過自新的賭徒/酒鬼/酒鬼/罪犯
The report describes the result as reformed. 報告將結果描述為改革後的結果。

meaning: 改革者或為改革而努力的人。
sentences: The term reformer refers to one who reforms, or who works for reform. 改革者一詞指的是改革者或為改革而努力的人。
The lesson introduced reformer as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了改革者作為一個有用的術語來理解。
To refrain means to show restraint; to hold oneself back. 克制意味著表現克制；阻止自己。
People may refrain in different situations depending on the context. 人們可能會根據具體情況在不同的情況下克制。
A cool drink of water will help to refresh you after the long hike. 長途健行後，喝口涼水會幫你提神。
You can easily refresh the webpage by clicking on the 'reload' button. 您可以點擊「重新整理」按鈕輕鬆更新網頁。

meaning: 複習以刷新或更新知識。
sentences: They recommend a refresher class every few years. 他們建議每隔幾年舉辦一次進修課程。
The term refresher refers to A review to refresh or renew knowledge. 術語「複習」是指刷新或更新知識的複習。

Please put the milk back in the refrigerator. 請把牛奶放回冰箱。

Our new refrigerator has a large freezer and an ice maker. 我們的新冰箱有一個大的冷凍室和一個製冰機。
The small island provided a safe refuge for many rare species of birds. 這個小島為許多稀有鳥類提供了一個安全的避難所（棲息地）。
They decided to seek refuge from the heavy rain in a nearby wooden cottage. 他們決定在附近的木屋裡躲雨（尋求庇護）。

If you are not satisfied with the product, you can return it for a full refund. 如果你對產品不滿意，可以退貨並獲得全額退款。
The airline agreed to refund the ticket price because the flight was cancelled. 由於航班取消，航空公司同意退還機票費用。
His sudden refusal to cooperate with the team surprised everyone. 他突然拒絕與團隊合作，這讓每個人都很驚訝。
The application was met with a polite refusal from the committee. 該申請遭到了委員會禮貌性的拒絕。
I had to refuse his invitation because I was already busy. 我不得不拒絕他的邀請，因為我已經很忙了。
She refused to comment on the controversial news report. 她拒絕就那篇有爭議的新聞報導發表評論。
The lawyer provided strong evidence to refute the witness's statements. 律師提供了有力證據來反駁（駁斥）目擊者的陳述。
He tried to refute the allegations of corruption made against him. 他試圖駁斥針對他的腐敗指控。
To regain means to get back; to recover possession of. 重新獲得意味著重新獲得；恢復佔有。
People may regain in different situations depending on the context. 根據具體情況，人們可能會在不同的情況下恢復。

meaning: 属于、关于或适合皇室的。
sentences: regal authority 皇家權威
the regal title 富麗堂皇的頭銜

meaning: 華麗、華麗的禮服，或奢華或華麗的服裝。
sentences: to be dressed in full regalia (dressed up) 穿著盛裝（盛裝打扮）
The term regalia refers to Finery, magnificent dress, or lavish or flashy costume. regalia一詞指的是華服、華麗的禮服、或奢華或華麗的服裝。
You should always treat other people with respect and regard. 你應該時刻以尊重和關心的態度對待他人。
The professor is highly regarded for his research in science. 這位教授因其在科學領域的研究而備受推崇。
I am writing to you regarding the upcoming conference next month. 我寫信給您是關於下個月即將舉行的會議。
He gave us some very useful information regarding the new project. 他向我們提供了一些關於新專案非常實用的資訊。
He decided to go for a run regardless of the cold weather and heavy rain. 不管天氣多冷、雨多大，他都決定去跑步。
The project will proceed regardless, even if we don't receive additional funding. 無論如何專案都會繼續進行，即使我們沒有收到額外資助。

meaning: 當國王或王后無法統治時取代國王或王后統治的政府制度。
sentences: The term regency refers to a system of government that substitutes for the reign of a king or queen when that king or queen becomes unable to rule. 攝政一詞是指當國王或王后無法統治時取代國王或王后統治的政府制度。
The lesson introduced regency as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了攝政作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 重新建構或創造，尤指以改進的方式。
sentences: To regenerate means to construct or create anew, especially in an improved manner. 再生意味著重新建構或創造，尤其是以改進的方式。
People may regenerate in different situations depending on the context. 根據環境的不同，人們可能會在不同的情況下重生。

meaning: 重建或重組；大規模維修或更新；振興。
sentences: The conversion of so many old industrial buildings into living quarters was a major factor in the regeneration. 將如此多的舊工業建築改造成居住區是復興的一個主要因素。
The term regeneration refers to rebuilding or restructuring; large scale repair or renewal; revitalisation. 再生一詞是指重建或重建；大規模維修或更新；振興。

meaning: 學院或大學理事會成員；也是華盛頓特區史密森學會的董事。
sentences: The term regent refers to a member of governing board of a college or university; also a governor of the Smithsonian Institution in Washington, D.C. 攝政一詞是指學院或大學管理委員會的成員；也是華盛頓特區史密森學會的董事
The lesson introduced regent as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了攝政作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
The country has experienced major changes following the fall of the old regime. 在舊政權倒台後，該國經歷了重大的變化。
The new manager introduced a strict training regime for the entire team. 新經理為整個團隊引入了一套嚴格的訓練制度（管理體制）。

meaning: 政府秩序井然；秩序系統；行政管理。
sentences: The term regimen refers to orderly government; system of order; administration. 所謂政體，就是指有秩序的政府。秩序系統；行政。
The lesson introduced regimen as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了「養生法」這個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 對個人、地點等的統治或治理；政府、當局。
sentences: The term regiment refers to rule or governance over a person, place etc.; government, authority. 「團」一詞指對一個人、一個地方等的統治或治理；政府，權威。
The lesson introduced regiment as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了「團」這個易於理解的有用術語。
The southern region of Taiwan is famous for its tropical fruit. 台灣南部地區以其熱帶水果聞名。
Peace and stability are essential for the prosperity of the region. 和平與穩定對於該地區的繁榮至關重要。
The company is planning to expand its regional distribution network. 公司正計劃擴展其區域性分銷網絡。
Regional differences in culture and food are very fascinating. 地區間文化與飲食的差異非常吸引人。
New students must register for their classes before the end of the week. 新生必須在本週末前註冊課程。
You can register your new laptop online to activate the warranty. 你可以在網上登記你的新筆電，以啟用保固。

meaning: 大學裡保存入學和學業成績紀錄的官員。
sentences: The term registrar refers to an officer in a university who keeps enrollment and academic achievement records. 註冊員一詞是指大學中負責保存入學和學業成績記錄的官員。
The lesson introduced registrar as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「註冊商」這個易於理解的有用術語。
Please complete the registration form and hand it in at the front desk. 請填寫註冊表並將其交給前台。
The registration fee for the marathon includes a T-shirt and a medal. 馬拉松的報名（註冊）費包括一件 T 恤和一枚獎牌。

meaning: 一個記錄；一個帳戶；一個暫存器。
sentences: The term registry refers to a record; an account; a register. 術語「註冊表」是指記錄；一個帳戶；一個暫存器。
The lesson introduced registry as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了註冊表作為一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 回歸的動作，回到先前的狀態。
sentences: The term regression refers to an action of regressing, a return to a previous state. 回歸一詞是指回歸的動作，也就是回到先前的狀態。
The lesson introduced regression as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了回歸這個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 這種情況往往會回歸、恢復或倒退。
sentences: The report describes the result as regressive. 該報告將這一結果描述為迴歸結果。
Everyone noticed the regressive tone of the message. 每個人都注意到了這則訊息的倒退語氣。
I deeply regret making that rude comment during the meeting. 我深切後悔在會議期間發表了那番粗魯的評論。
She expressed her regret for not attending her friend's wedding. 她對沒能參加朋友的婚禮表達了遺憾。

meaning: 可以後悔，尤其值得後悔。
sentences: The officers' actions were regrettable, yes, but there's nothing to be done now but to relocate everyone to the mainland in a calm and orderly manner. 是的，官員們的行為令人遺憾，但現在沒有辦法，只能平靜有序地將所有人轉移到大陸。
The report describes the result as regrettable. 報告稱這項結果令人遺憾。

meaning: 以一種鼓舞人心或值得遺憾的方式。
sentences: Your exam results are regrettably poor: you should regretfully reflect on all the time wasted reading comics. 你的考試成績很差，你應該遺憾地反思浪費在看漫畫上的時間。
The team responded regrettably to the change. 團隊對這項變化做出了遺憾的反應。
To regroup means to pause and become organized again. To regroup means to pause and become organized again.
People may regroup in different situations depending on the context. 人們可能會根據具體情況在不同情況下重新組合。
Regular exercise and a balanced diet are key to good health. 定期運動與均衡飲食是健康的關鍵。
She is a regular customer at our cozy little neighborhood café. 她是我們這家溫馨小咖啡館的常客。
I have been watching that show with regularity. 我一直定期觀看該節目。
The term regularity refers to the condition or quality of being regular. 術語「規律性」是指規律性的條件或品質。

meaning: 具有恆定的頻率或模式。
sentences: We regularly buy lottery tickets from the corner store. 我們經常從街角商店購買彩票。
If someone acts regularly, they do so in a way that is with constant frequency or pattern. 如果某人有規律地行事，他們就會以恆定的頻率或模式來行事。

You can use the thermostat to regulate the temperature in the room. 你可以使用恆溫器來調節房間內的溫度。
All employees must comply with the safety regulations in the factory. 所有員工必須遵守工廠的安全規定。
The government introduced new regulations to reduce environmental pollution. 政府引入了新的法規以減少環境污染。

meaning: 控製或限制某物的裝置。
sentences: The regulator stopped working and the resulting overvoltage destroyed the device. 調節器停止工作，由此產生的過壓損壞了設備。
The term regulator refers to a device that controls or limits something. 調節器一詞是指控製或限制某物的裝置。
Something described as regulatory is of or pertaining to regulation. 被描述為監管的事物屬於監管或與監管有關。
The word regulatory is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 監管一詞通常用於描述人、事物或情況。
The program aims to rehabilitate individuals who have suffered from addiction. 該計畫旨在幫助曾受成癮困擾的人康復。
The government is investing money to rehabilitate the historic city center. 政府正投入資金修復歷史悠久的市中心。
The actors spent the whole afternoon in rehearsal for the final performance. 演員們整個下午都在為最後的演出進行排練。
The choir had a final dress rehearsal before the concert tonight. 合唱團在今晚的音樂會前進行了最後的帶妝預演（排練）。
The actors spent the whole afternoon rehearsing for the final performance. 演員們整個下午都在為最後的演出進行排練。
She decided to rehearse her speech in front of the mirror several times. 她決定在鏡子前練習（預演）幾次她的演講。
The country experienced major social changes during the Queen's long reign. 在女王長期的統治期間，該國經歷了重大的社會變革。
The empire reached its peak of power during the reign of the wise king. 該帝國在英明國王統治時期達到了權力的巔峰。

meaning: 以 補償 付款;特別是，償還為某人<a rel="mtlew:WikiLink" href="/wiki/halfin="awtlew:WikiLink" href="/wiki/halfx"w
sentences: The company will reimburse you for your expenses for the business trip. 本公司將 報銷 您的出差費用。 本公司將報銷您出差的費用。 本公司將報銷您的出差費用。
People often reimburse when the situation calls for it. 人們通常會在情況需要時進行補償。 人們通常會在情況需要時進行補償。 人們通常會在情況需要時進行補償。

The new manager took over the reins of the company last month. 新經理上個月接管了公司的控制權。

meaning: 靈魂以物質生命形式（例如身體）重生。
sentences: He is believed to be the reincarnation of Jesus. 他被認為是耶穌的轉世。
Do you believe in reincarnation? 你相信輪迴嗎？

meaning: 任何生活在北極和亞北極的鹿，屬於Rangifer tarandus，有許多亞種。
sentences: Santa Claus' sleigh is supposedly pulled by nine reindeer 據說聖誕老公公的雪橇是由九隻馴鹿拉的
The term reindeer refers to any Arctic and subarctic-dwelling deer of the species Rangifer tarandus, with a number of subspecies. 馴鹿一詞是指任何生活在北極和亞北極的鹿，屬於Rangifer tarandus，有許多亞種。

There's a website that can be a good learning reinforcement. 有一個網站可以很好地強化學習。
The term reinforcement refers to A thing that reinforces. 術語「強化」指的是強化的事物。
To reinstate means to bring back into use or existence; resurrect. 恢復意味著恢復使用或存在；復活。
People may reinstate in different situations depending on the context. 人們可能會根據具體情況在不同情況下恢復。

meaning: 將某物恢復到之前狀態的行為。
sentences: Many people are unhappy with the sacking of the chief constable and demand his immediate reinstatement. 許多人對警察局長被解僱感到不滿，並要求他立即復職。
The term reinstatement refers to The act of restoring something to its previous state. 恢復一詞是指將某物恢復到之前狀態的行為。

meaning: 已經發布或再次發布的東西。
sentences: Copies of the original comic are valued by collectors, but the reissues are worthless. 原版漫畫的副本受到收藏家的重視，但再版則毫無價值。
The term reissue refers to Something that has issued, or been issued again. 重新發行一詞是指已經發行或再次發行的東西。

meaning: 第二次說或做（某事），例如為了強調。
sentences: Let me reiterate my opinion. 讓我重申我的觀點。
To reiterate means to say or do (something) for a second time, such as for emphasis. 重申意味著第二次說或做（某事），例如為了強調。
The company decided to reject the new project proposal. 公司決定拒絕這項新專案提案。
He felt very hurt after his application was rejected by the university. 他的申請被大學拒絕後感到非常受傷。
Dealing with rejection is a difficult but necessary part of life. 處理拒絕是生活中艱難但必要的一部分。
He felt discouraged after receiving several rejection letters from publishers. 在收到幾封出版商的拒絕信後，他感到很沮喪。
The entire family gathered to rejoice in the news of the baby's arrival. 全家人聚集在一起，為寶寶到來的消息感到欣喜。
The crowd rejoiced as their team managed to score the winning goal. 當球隊踢進致勝球時，人群歡呼（欣喜）雀躍。
There was much rejoicing when the good news finally arrived. 當好消息終於傳來時，大家都很高興。
The term rejoicing refers to An act of showing joy. 喜樂一詞指的是表現出喜樂的行為。

meaning: 再倒退；滑回到以前的狀態或練習。
sentences: to relapse into a stupor, into vice, or into barbarism 重新陷入昏迷、罪惡或野蠻狀態
to relapse into slumber after being disturbed 被打擾後重新入睡

meaning: 能夠與其他事物相關；連結到。
sentences: The damage was relatable to the recent earthquake. 此次損壞與最近的地震有關。
Something described as relatable is able to be related to something else; connected with. 被描述為相關的事物能夠與其他事物相關；與. 連結。

I can relate to your feelings because I've been in that situation. 我能體會妳的感受，因為我也曾處於那種情況。

meaning: 處於 關係 或 連接 。
sentences: Electric and magnetic forces are closely related. 電力和磁力 密切相關 。 電力和磁力密切相關。 電力與磁力密切相關。
on a related note 關於 相關 註釋 關於相關註釋
There is a clear relation between hard work and success in life. 努力工作與人生成功之間有著明確的關係。
International relations are becoming increasingly complex nowadays. 國際關係正變得日益複雜。

meaning: 處理整個人際關係及其社會背景，而不是一個獨立的私人空間。
sentences: relational art 關係藝術
Something described as relational is dealing with the whole of human relations and their social context, rather than an independent and private space. 被描述為關係的東西是處理整個人際關係及其社會背景，而不是一個獨立和私人的空間。
Trust and communication are the foundations of a good relationship. 信任與溝通是良好關係的基礎。
He has a very close relationship with his elder brother. 他與他的哥哥關係非常親密。
Most of my relatives live in the countryside and visit us once a year. 我的大多數親戚住在鄉下，每年來探望我們一次。
The value of the currency is relative to the economic situation. 貨幣的價值相對於經濟狀況而定。

meaning: 以相對的方式；參考環境或競爭；上下文或比較。
sentences: If someone acts relatively, they do so in a way that is in a relative manner; with reference to environment or competition; contextually or comparatively. 如果某人的行為是相對的，那麼他們就會以相對的方式這樣做；參考環境或競爭；上下文或相對而言。
The speaker responded relatively during the discussion. 發言者在討論中做出了相對的回應。

meaning: 与其他事物相关的状态；缺乏普遍适用的规则或标准；相对主义；一个这样的例子。
sentences: The term relativity refers to the state of being relative to something else; the absence of universally applicable rules or standards; relativism; an instance of this. 術語「相對性」是指與其他事物相關的狀態。缺乏普遍適用的規則或標準；相對主義；一個這樣的例子。
The lesson introduced relativity as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了相對論作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
Listening to classical music helps me relax after a long day. 聽古典音樂能幫我在漫長的一天後放鬆心情。
Let's just stay at home and relax during the upcoming weekend. 讓我們週末就待在家裡好好放鬆一下吧。
Yoga is a great way to achieve physical and mental relaxation. 瑜伽是實現身心放鬆的好方法。
I need some relaxation after working such long hours this week. 這週工作了這麼長時間，我需要放鬆一下。

meaning: 變得更寬鬆；不太嚴格；鬆懈。
sentences: The relaxed rules were greatly tightened after the lawsuit. 訴訟後，寬鬆的規定大大收緊。
The report describes the result as relaxed. 報告稱結果是輕鬆的。
The satellite was used to relay the live television signal across the world. 衛星被用來將電視直播訊號轉播到世界各地。
The local team won the 4x100 meter relay race in the final match. 當地隊在決賽中贏得了 4x100 米接力賽。
The company will release its new smartphone model next month. 公司將於下個月發佈新款智慧型手機型號。
The prisoner was finally released from jail after ten years. 囚犯在服刑十年後終於從監獄獲釋（發布）。

meaning: 降級的行為由於賽季結束時積分低於其他級別而從一個級別轉移到較低級別的行為。
sentences: The term relegation refers to the act of being relegated Moving from one division to a lower one, due to finishing the season with fewer points than others. 降級一詞是指由於賽季結束時積分低於其他級別而從一個級別降級到較低級別的行為。
The lesson introduced relegation as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了降級作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
The relentless heat of the desert made the journey extremely difficult. 沙漠持續不斷的（酷熱）熱浪讓旅程變得異常艱難。
He showed relentless determination in his pursuit of truth and justice. 他在追求真理與正義的過程中展現了無情（堅定不移）的決心。

meaning: 相關或相關的屬性或狀態。
sentences: The term relevance refers to the property or state of being relevant or pertinent. 術語相關性是指相關或相關的屬性或狀態。
The lesson introduced relevance as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了相關性作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 相關的、切題的、有意義的
sentences: Please make sure your questions are relevant to the topic of discussion. 請確保你的問題與討論的主題相關（切題）。
She has all the relevant experience required for this senior position. 她具備擔任這個高級職位所需的所有相關經驗。

meaning: 可靠、可靠或值得信賴的品質。
sentences: The term reliability refers to the quality of being reliable, dependable, or trustworthy. 術語「可靠性」是指可靠、可靠或值得信賴的品質。
The lesson introduced reliability as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了可靠性這一易於理解的有用術語。
She is a very reliable and hardworking employee who is valued. 她是一位非常可靠且勤奮的員工，深受重視。
The public transportation in this city is very reliable and on time. 這座城市的大眾運輸非常可靠且準時。
Genuine cowards follow the wicked and cannot reliably sustain any virtue. 真正的懦夫追隨惡人，無法可靠地維持任何美德。
If someone acts reliably, they do so in a way that is in a reliable manner. 如果某人的行為可靠，那麼他們就會以可靠的方式行事。
The company's reliance on a single supplier proved to be a major risk. 公司對單一供應商的依賴被證明是一個重大風險。
Building mutual trust and reliance is essential for a successful partnership. 建立互信與依賴對於成功的夥伴關係至關重要。
The small island is heavily reliant on tourism for its local economy. 這個小島的當地經濟嚴重依賴旅遊業。
We should strive to become more self-reliant and independent in our work. 我們應該努力在工作中變得更加自立（依賴自己）和獨立。
The museum features several rare relics found in the ancient temple ruins. 博物館展出了在古廟遺址中發現的幾件稀有遺物（遺跡）。
The old wooden cottage is a beautiful relic of the city's early history. 那座老木屋是城市早期歷史的一件精美遺跡。
The news of the success was a huge relief to everyone involved. 成功的消息對所有參與者來說都是個巨大的解脫。
The government provided emergency relief to the earthquake victims. 政府為地震災民提供了緊急救援（寬慰）。
The doctor prescribed some medicine to help relieve the pain. 醫生開了一些藥來幫助緩解疼痛。
It was a huge relief to hear that everyone was safe after the earthquake. 聽到地震後大家都平安無事，真是鬆了一口大氣（減輕了壓力）。

meaning: 經歷或表現出緩解；擺脫壓力或不適。
sentences: She was extremely relieved when the lesson finished. 課程結束後，她感到非常輕鬆。
The report describes the result as relieved. 報告稱這項結果讓人鬆了一口氣。
The first reliever got the last two outs of the sixth. 第一個中繼投手在第六局中獲得了最後兩分。
The term reliever refers to A relief pitcher. 術語「後援投手」指的是後援投手。
People have different religious beliefs and traditions worldwide. 世界各地的人擁有不同的宗教信仰與傳統。
Freedom of religion is a basic human right in many societies. 宗教自由是許多社會的一項基本人權。
The ancient temple is a place of great religious significance. 這座古代寺廟是一個具備重大宗教意義的地方。
People have different religious beliefs and traditions worldwide. 世界各地的人擁有不同的宗教信仰與傳統。

meaning: 熱情或勤奮；忠實;認真地。
sentences: It is odd he gets so many cavities since he brushes his teeth religiously, every night, rain or shine. 奇怪的是，自從他每晚認真刷牙（無論風雨無阻）以來，他竟然長了這麼多蛀牙。
If someone acts religiously, they do so in a way that is passionately or diligently; faithfully; conscientiously. 如果有人虔誠地行事，他們就會以熱情或勤奮的方式這樣做；忠實;切實。

meaning: 放棄、遺棄或退出某事；進行交易。
sentences: to relinquish a title 放棄頭銜
to relinquish property 放棄財產

meaning: 為（某人、自己或某事）感到高興或高興。
sentences: He relishes their time together. 他很享受他們在一起的時光。
I don’t relish the idea of going out tonight. 我不喜歡今晚出去的想法。

meaning: 使人復活；使恢復，使復甦。
sentences: To relive means to bring back to life; to revive, resuscitate. 重溫意味著恢復生機；使復活、復甦。
People may relive in different situations depending on the context. 根據上下文，人們可能會在不同的情況下重溫。

meaning: 重新載入某些內容的過程。
sentences: Each reload of the weapon took about 30 seconds. 每次武器裝彈大約需要 30 秒。
The term reload refers to the process by which something is reloaded. 術語「重新載入」是指重新載入某些內容的過程。

meaning: 將（某物）從一個地方移動到另一個地方。
sentences: We had to relocate the magazine rack because we bruised our shins on it too frequently when it was near the door. 我們不得不重新安置雜誌架，因為當它靠近門時，我們經常被它擦傷小腿。
To relocate means to move (something) from one place to another. 搬遷意味著將（某物）從一個地方移動到另一個地方。

meaning: 從一個地方移動到另一個地方的行為。
sentences: The term relocation refers to the act of moving from one place to another. 搬遷一詞是指從一個地方搬到另一個地方的行為。
The lesson introduced relocation as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了搬遷作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
Our new dog shows reluctance to go on walks, preferring to be indoors. 我們的新狗不願意散步，更喜歡待在室內。
The term reluctance refers to unwillingness to do something. 不情願這個字是指不願意做某件事。
He was reluctant to admit that he had made a mistake in front of his colleagues. 他不情願在同事面前承認自己犯了錯。
She gave a reluctant smile when they asked her to perform on stage. 當他們要求她上台表演時，她露出了勉強的微笑。

meaning: 以不情願或猶豫的方式。
sentences: If someone acts reluctantly, they do so in a way that is in a reluctant or hesitant manner. 如果某人不情願地行事，他們會以不情願或猶豫的方式這樣做。
The speaker responded reluctantly during the discussion. 發言者在討論中勉強回答。
You can always rely on your best friends in times of need. 在需要的時候，妳總是可以依靠妳最好的朋友。
The success of the project relies on our teamwork and dedication. 專案的成功依賴於我們的團隊合作與奉獻。
It is important to remain calm and focused during an emergency. 在緊急情況下保持冷靜與專注是很重要的。
The mystery of the disappearance managed to remain unsolved. 消失之謎竟然（保持）懸而未決。
I'll finish the first part of the report now and do the remainder tonight. 我現在會完成報告的第一部分，今晚再做剩餘部分。
The teacher asked the students to solve the math problem and find the remainder. 老師要求學生解開這道數學題並算出餘數。
To his great intellectual powers his published remains bear abundant witness. 他出版的遺著充分證明了他偉大的智力。
The term remains refers to The extant writings of a deceased person. 「遺骸」一詞是指死者現存的著作。

meaning: 製作（電影、電玩等）的新版本，特別是更新版本。
sentences: The director wanted to remake some of his favourite films from the Golden Age of Hollywood. 導演想翻拍一些他最喜歡的好萊塢黃金時代的電影。
To remake means to make a new, especially updated, version of (a film, video game, etc.). 翻拍是指製作（電影、電玩等）的新版本、特別是更新版本。
The teacher's encouraging remarks on my essay gave me a lot of confidence. 老師對我文章的鼓勵性評論給了我很大的信心。
He remarked that the weather was unusually warm for this time of year. 他談到（評論說）今年這個時節的天氣異常溫暖。

meaning: 卓越的、非凡的、值得注意的
sentences: She has made remarkable progress in her piano playing over the past year. 在過去的一年裡，她的鋼琴彈奏取得了卓越（顯著）的進步。
It is remarkable that the old bridge is still standing after so many years. 這座老橋在這麼多年後依然屹立不倒，真是令人驚嘆（非凡）。

meaning: 用來引起對某個命題的特別注意。
sentences: Remarkably, three State assembly elections were decided by a total of fewer than one hundred votes. 值得注意的是，三場州議會選舉都是以不到一百票的總票數決定的。
If someone acts remarkably, they do so in a way that is used to draw special attention to a proposition. 如果某人表現出色，他們這樣做的方式是為了引起人們對某個主張的特別注意。

meaning: 與上一場相同的對手或球隊之間重複進行的比賽。
sentences: After being beaten in pool by Melanie, John asked for a rematch. 在桌球比賽中被梅蘭妮擊敗後，約翰要求重賽。
The term rematch refers to a repeated contest staged between the same opponents or teams which played a previous contest. 複賽一詞是指與上一場相同的對手或球隊之間重複進行的比賽。

meaning: 補救情況的行為或過程。
sentences: The site required extensive environmental remediation before it could be used for other purposes. 該場地需要進行廣泛的環境整治才能用於其他目的。
The term remediation refers to The act or process of remedying a situation. 補救一詞是指補救情況的行為或過程。
Drinking hot ginger tea is a popular home remedy for a common cold. 喝熱薑茶是治療感冒的一種流行居家療法（補救方法）。
We need to find an effective remedy for the problem before it gets worse. 我們需要在問題惡化之前找到有效的補救方法。
Please remember to lock the door when you leave the house. 離開時請記得鎖門。
I can't remember the name of the person we met yesterday. 我記不起昨天我們遇到的那個人的名字了。

meaning: 記憶的行為；牢記在心，或想起；回憶。
sentences: The term remembrance refers to the act of remembering; a holding in mind, or bringing to mind; recollection. 記憶一詞是指記憶的行為；牢記在心，或想起；回憶。
The lesson introduced remembrance as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了記憶作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
Please remind me to lock the front door before we leave. 請提醒我在我們離開前鎖上大門。
This beautiful song always reminds me of my happy childhood. 這首動聽的歌總能讓我想起快樂的童年。
Please set a reminder on your phone for the meeting tomorrow morning. 請在手機上設置一個提醒，提示明天早上的會議。
The old photograph served as a moving reminder of their happy childhood. 那張舊照片是對他們快樂童年的一個動人回憶（提醒物）。
The painting's style is reminiscent of the great masters of the Renaissance. 這幅畫的風格讓人想起文藝復興時期的偉大名家。
Her beautiful voice is reminiscent of a famous opera singer from the past. 她優美的嗓音讓人回想起過去一位著名的歌劇演唱家。

meaning: 疾病表現的減輕或減輕；沒有疾病症狀的時期。
sentences: Her cancer was in remission. 她的癌症已得到緩解。
The term remission refers to an abatement or lessening of the manifestations of a disease; a period where the symptoms of a disease are absent. 術語「緩解」是指疾病表現的減輕或減輕；沒有疾病症狀的時期。

meaning: 避免強加或強制執行；取消。
sentences: to remit the performance of an obligation 免除履行義務
To remit means to refrain from exacting or enforcing; to cancel. 免除意味著不強求或強制執行；取消。

meaning: 舊樂曲的重新編排，可能包括各種外觀上的改變。
sentences: The term remix refers to a rearrangement of an older piece of music, possibly including various cosmetic changes. 混音一詞是指舊音樂作品的重新編排，可能包括各種外觀上的變化。
The lesson introduced remix as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了混音作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 較大事物或群體中剩餘的一小部分；前整體的一部分。
sentences: The remnants of the Neanderthal race mixed with members of Homo sapiens. 尼安德塔人的殘餘與智人的成員混合在一起。
The term remnant refers to a small portion remaining of a larger thing or group; part of a former whole. 術語「殘餘」是指較大事物或群體中剩餘的一小部分；以前整體的一部分。
They decided to remodel their kitchen next summer. 他們決定明年夏天重新裝修廚房。
The company is planning to remodel its existing business strategy. 公司正計畫更新其現有的業務策略。
He felt a deep sense of remorse for what he had done. 他對自己的所作所為感到深深的悔恨。
She showed no remorse for her actions during the trial. 審判期間，她對自己的行為沒有表現出任何自責。
The small village is located in a remote mountain area. 那個小村莊位於偏遠的山區。
The possibility of a global financial crisis seems quite remote. 全球金融危機的可能性似乎相當遙遠。
I'm not remotely in love with you. 我並沒有完全愛上你。
If someone acts remotely, they do so in a way that is not much; scarcely; hardly. 如果有人遠端行動，他們的方式並不多；幾乎沒有；幾乎沒有。
The term removable refers to something that can be removed. 可移除一詞是指可以移除的東西。
The lesson introduced removable as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了可移動作為一個有用的術語來理解。
The removal of the old furniture took several hours and required a large truck. 搬走（移走）舊家具花了幾個小時，還需要一輛大卡車。
The board of directors voted for the removal of the CEO following the scandal. 董事會在醜聞發生後投票免除了執行長的職務。
Please remove your shoes before you enter the house. 進入屋內前請先脫鞋。
The surgeon performed a difficult operation to remove the tumor. 外科醫生進行了一場艱難的手術以切除腫瘤。

meaning: 在時間、空間或程度分開。
sentences: Now that we are here one week removed... 現在我們已經在這裡 移除 一週了... 現在我們已經在這裡移除一周了...現在我們已經在這裡移除一周了...
The report describes the result as removed. 該報告將結果描述為已刪除。 該報告將結果描述為已刪除。 該報告將結果描述為已刪除。

meaning: 移除的代理名詞；一個被移除的人，或那個被移除的人。
sentences: We had to take my little brother to the hospital when he swallowed some of my sister's nail-polish remover. 當我弟弟吞下了我姐姐的指甲油去除劑時，我們不得不帶他去醫院。
The term remover refers to Agent noun of remove; one who, or that which, removes. 術語remover是指remove的代理名詞；一個被移除的人，或那個被移除的人。

meaning: 已完成工作的報酬；薪水、薪水、報酬。
sentences: The term remuneration refers to a payment for work done; wages, salary, emolument. 報酬一詞是指已完成工作的報酬；工資，薪金，報酬。
The lesson introduced remuneration as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了薪酬這個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 文藝復興時期的替代字母大小寫形式。
sentences: The term renaissance refers to alternative letter-case form of Renaissance. 文藝復興一詞是指文藝復興時期的替代字母大小寫形式。
The lesson introduced renaissance as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了文藝復興這個易於理解的有用術語。
renal transplant 腎臟移植
Something described as renal is pertaining to the kidneys. 被描述為腎臟的東西與腎臟有關。
The sudden economic crisis could render the entire project impossible. 突如其來的經濟危機可能使整個專案變得不可能（執行）。
The company decided to render financial assistance to the families in need. 公司決定向困難家庭提供經濟援助。

meaning: 在特定 地點 和 時間 舉行的 。
sentences: Get the party started at the rendezvous at oh six hours. 六點鐘在 集合點 開始聚會。 聚會在六點鐘的集合點開始。 六點鐘在集合點開始聚會。

The term rendezvous refers to An agreement to meet at a certain place and time. 集合一詞是指在某個 地點 和 時間 會面的<a reltlemw:WikiLink" href="/wiki/comement" href="/wiki="aement" 合同。 約會一詞是指約定在特定地點和時間會面。 集合行動是指在某個地點和時間會面的<a reltlemw:WikiLink" href="/wiki/comement" href="/wiki="aement" 合約。

meaning: 語言之間或語言形式之間的翻譯；翻譯的文本或作品。
sentences: The term rendition refers to translation between languages, or between forms of a language; a translated text or work. 術語翻譯是指語言之間或語言形式之間的翻譯；翻譯的文本或作品。
The lesson introduced rendition as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了演繹作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 放棄自己的事業，或改變自己的忠誠；背叛。
sentences: To renegade means to desert one's cause, or change one's loyalties; to commit betrayal. 叛逆意味著放棄自己的事業，或改變自己的忠誠；犯下背叛。
People may renegade in different situations depending on the context. 根據具體情況，人們可能會在不同情況下背叛。
I need to go to the library to renew my books for another two weeks. 我需要去圖書館把書續借（更新）兩週。
They decided to renew their wedding vows on their tenth anniversary. 他們決定在結婚十週年紀念日重新宣讀（更新）他們的婚約。

meaning: 可持續的;能夠再生或更新；擁有持續或連續的供應來源。
sentences: renewable resource 再生資源
renewable energy 再生能源
to renounce a title to land or to a throne 放棄土地或王位的所有權
To renounce means to give up, resign, surrender. 放棄意味著放棄、辭職、投降。

meaning: 更新；改造某物，使其再次煥然一新。
sentences: To renovate means to renew; to revamp something to make it look new again. 翻新意味著更新；改造某物，使其看起來煥然一新。
People may renovate in different situations depending on the context. 人們可能會根據具體情況在不同情況下進行翻新。
His room was currently under renovation. 他的房間目前正在裝修。
The term renovation refers to an act, or the process, of renovating. 翻新一詞是指翻新的行為或過程。

meaning: 高貴或成就的報告；讚美。
sentences: The term renown refers to reports of nobleness or achievements; praise. 「名聲」一詞是指有關高貴或成就的報道；讚美。
The lesson introduced renown as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「聲譽」這個術語，它是一個需要理解的有用術語。
He is a renowned expert in the field of modern computer architecture. 他是現代計算機架構領域知名的（有聲望的）專家。
The city is renowned for its beautiful historic temples and vibrant culture. 這座城市以其美麗的古寺和充滿活力的文化而著名。
They are planning to rent a small apartment in the city center. 他們計劃在市中心租一間小公寓。
How much is the monthly rent for this beautiful office space? 這間漂亮辦公室的月租是多少？
We decided to look for a car rental agency near the airport for our road trip. 我們決定在機場附近找一家租車公司來進行自駕遊。
The monthly rental for the small apartment in the city center is quite high. 市中心這間小公寓的月租金相當高。
To reopen means to open (something) again. 重新打開意味著再次打開（某物）。
People may reopen in different situations depending on the context. 人們可能會根據具體情況在不同情況下重新開放。
The mechanic managed to repair the broken car engine in an hour. 技師在一個小時內修好了壞掉的汽車引擎。
The old bridge is currently closed for necessary repairs. 那座舊橋目前因必要維修而關閉。
He promised to repay the money he borrowed from his friend as soon as possible. 他承諾會盡快償還向朋友借的錢。
I don't know how I can ever repay you for all the kindness you have shown me. 我不知道該如何報答你對我的所有善意。

meaning: 償還的金錢或其他物品。
sentences: The term repayment refers to the money or other item that is repaid. 償還一詞是指償還的金錢或其他物品。
The lesson introduced repayment as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了還款作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
to repeal a law 廢除法律
To repeal means to cancel, invalidate, annul. 廢除的意思是取消、無效、廢除。
Could you please repeat that again? I didn't hear you clearly. 你可以再重複一次嗎？我沒聽清楚。
History has a tendency to repeat itself if we don't learn from it. 如果我們不從中學習，歷史往往會重演。
He repeatedly violated the court order, and shall now be punished. 他多次違反法院命令，現應受到處罰。
If someone acts repeatedly, they do so in a way that is done several times or in repetition. 如果某人重複行事，他們會以多次或重複的方式這樣做。

meaning: 引起排斥或不喜歡；厭惡。
sentences: To repel means to cause repulsion or dislike in; to disgust. 排斥意味著引起排斥或不喜歡；令人厭惡。
People may repel in different situations depending on the context. 根據具體情況，人們可能會在不同情況下產生排斥。

meaning: 用於驅除昆蟲、危險動物或其他害蟲的物質或溶液。
sentences: None of the mosquito repellents we've tried work. 我們嘗試過的驅蚊​​劑都不起作用。
The term repellent refers to A substance or solution used to repel insects, dangerous animals, or other pests. 驅蟲劑一詞是指用於驅除昆蟲、危險動物或其他害蟲的物質或溶液。

meaning: 對自己所做或未做的事情感到痛苦、悲傷或遺憾；悔改的原因可用「of」表示。
sentences: Marry in haste, repent at leisure. 匆匆結婚，閒悔。
To repent means to feel pain, sorrow, or regret for what one has done or omitted to do; the cause for repenting may be indicated with "of". 悔改意味著對自己所做或未做的事情感到痛苦、悲傷或遺憾；悔改的原因可以用「of」來表示。
The term repentance refers to the condition of being repentant, penitent. 悔改這個字是指悔改、懺悔的狀態。
The lesson introduced repentance as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了悔改這個有用的術語，需要理解。

meaning: 公司或個人已經排練並準備表演或展示的戲劇、歌劇、作品、片段等清單。
sentences: The conjurer expanded his repertoire with some new tricks. 魔術師用一些新戲法擴展了他的表演技巧。
The term repertoire refers to a list of dramas, operas, pieces, parts, etc., which a company or a person has rehearsed and is prepared to perform or display. 劇目是指劇團或個人已經排練並準備演出或展示的戲劇、歌劇、作品、片段等清單。
Learning a language requires constant repetition and practice. 學習語言需要不斷的重複和練習。
The movie was boring because of the constant repetition of the same jokes. 這部電影很無聊，因為同樣的笑話一直重複。

meaning: 類似的情況多次發生；包含重複；重複。
sentences: The lecture was too repetitive and lost its impact. 講座過於重複，失去了影響力。
He kept repeating the same repetitive tasks without making progress. 他不斷地重複著同樣的重複性工作，卻毫無進展。

meaning: 用不同的措詞說或寫一些東西。
sentences: Make sure to rephrase your thesis in your conclusion. 確保在結論中重新表達你的論文。
People often rephrase when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們經常會重新措詞。
We need to replace the old batteries in the remote control. 我們需要更換遙控器裡的舊電池。
He was chosen to replace the manager who retired last month. 他被選中取代上個月退休的經理。
We need to replace the broken window as soon as possible. 我們需要儘快更換那扇破窗戶。
The company is looking for a suitable replacement for the manager. 公司正在尋找適合接替經理的人選（替代品）。
a replaceable battery replaceable parts 可更換電池 可更換零件
The machine uses a replaceable filter. 該機器使用可更換的過濾器。
The replacement of that broken light-bulb will have to wait until I can buy a new one. 更換那個壞掉的燈泡必須等到我能買一個新的為止。
The term replacement refers to the act of replacing something. 術語「替換」是指替換某物的行為。

meaning: 重播的行為或實例（再次玩某事，例如遊戲）； （某事）的重播。
sentences: The term replay refers to an act or instance of replaying (of playing something, such as a game, again); a replaying of (something). 術語「重播」是指重播的行為或實例（再次玩某事，例如遊戲）；重播（某事）。
The lesson introduced replay as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了重播這個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 重新填充；更新；再次供應或添加新數量。
sentences: It's a popular product, and they have to replenish their stock of it frequently. 這是一種受歡迎的產品，他們必須經常補充庫存。
To replenish means to refill; to renew; to supply again or to add a fresh quantity to. 補充的意思是補充；更新；再次供應或增加新數量。

meaning: 比原件尺寸更小的複製件。
sentences: He collected replicas of old cars. 他收集舊汽車的複製品。
The term replica refers to a copy made at a smaller scale than the original. 術語「複製品」是指以比原件更小的尺寸製作的副本。

meaning: 向上或向後折疊；向後折疊。
sentences: a replicate leaf or petal 複製的葉子或花瓣
the replicate margin of a shell 殼的複製邊距
That painting is an almost exact replication of a famous Rembrandt painting. 這幅畫幾乎是倫勃朗著名畫作的精確複製品。
The term replication refers to copy; reproduction. 術語複製指的是複製；生殖。
I'm sorry for the delay in my reply to your important email. 很抱歉遲回了您重要的郵件。
Please give me a clear reply by tomorrow afternoon at the latest. 請最遲在明天下午前給我一個明確的回覆。
The journalist submitted a detailed report on the event. 記者提交了一份關於該事件的詳細報告。
The company is expected to report a large profit this year. 預計公司今年將報告巨額利潤。
The news reporter interviewed the survivors of the disaster. 新聞記者採訪了災難中的倖存者。
He works as a foreign correspondent and reporter in the Middle East. 他在國外擔任中東地區的特派員與記者。

meaning: 儲存待售物品的地方；一家商店。
sentences: The term repository refers to a place where things are stored for sale; a shop. 「儲存庫」一詞是指存放待售物品的地方；一家商店。
The lesson introduced repository as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了儲存庫作為一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 再次發文的行為；這樣發布的資料。
sentences: This newsgroup mostly seems to consist of reposts of the FAQ. Doesn't anyone talk? 這個新聞群組似乎主要由常見問題的轉發組成。沒有人說話嗎？
The term repost refers to the act of posting again; the material thus posted. 重新發布一詞是指再次發布的行為；如此發布的材料。
The red color on the map represents the high-density areas. 地圖上的紅色代表高密度區域。
The athlete was proud to represent his country in the Olympics. 那位運動員為能代表國家參加奧運會感到自豪。
The painting is a beautiful representation of life in the countryside. 這幅畫是對鄉村生活的精美描繪（表現）。
Each district has its own political representation in the local government. 每個地區在地方政府中都有自己的政治代表。
The company sent a representative to negotiate the new contract. 公司派了一名代表去洽談新合約。
The sample should be representative of the entire population. 樣本應具備整個人群的代表性。

meaning: 有力阻止事態進一步發展。
sentences: to repress rebellion or sedition 鎮壓叛亂或煽動
to repress the first risings of discontent 鎮壓最初的不滿情緒
History shows that when governments fear the truth and increase repression, their days are limited. 歷史表明，當政府害怕真相並加強鎮壓時，他們的日子就有限了。
The term repression refers to the act of repressing; state of being repressed. 鎮壓一詞是指鎮壓的行為；被壓抑的狀態。

meaning: 用於鎮壓或鎮壓；壓抑的。
sentences: Something described as repressive is serving to repress or suppress; oppressive. 被描述為壓抑的東西是用來壓抑或鎮壓的；壓抑的。
The word repressive is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 壓抑這個詞常用來形容人、事或情況。
The prisoner was saved from execution; the governor had requested a reprieve. 囚犯被免於處決；州長請求緩刑。
The term reprieve refers to The cancellation or postponement of a punishment. 緩刑一詞是指取消或延後處罰。

meaning: 嚴厲的、正式的或官方的責備；私下或公開的譴責、斥責。
sentences: The term reprimand refers to A severe, formal or official reproof; reprehension, rebuke, private or public. 譴責一詞是指嚴厲的、正式的或官方的譴責；私下或公開的譴責、斥責。
We learned the meaning of reprimand during today's lesson. 今天的課我們學習了斥責的意思。

meaning: 以前出版過一次但現在再次出版的書籍、小冊子或其他印刷品。
sentences: The reprint is much less expensive than a first edition. 重印版比初版便宜得多。
The term reprint refers to a book, pamphlet or other printed matter that has been published once before but is now being released again. 「重印」一詞是指以前出版過一次但現在再次發行的書籍、小冊子或其他印刷品。

meaning: 重複 或恢復某個操作或角色。
sentences: The aging actress played the role she played in her youth, as if to reprise it. 這位年邁的女演員扮演著她年輕時扮演的角色，彷彿要 重演 。 這位年邁的女演員扮演著她年輕時扮演的角色，彷彿要重演。 年邁的女演員扮演著她年輕時扮演的角色，彷彿要重演。
People often reprise when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會重新行動。 當情況需要時，人們常常會重新行動。 當情況需要時，人們通常會重新採取行動。
His behavior was beyond reproach. 他的行為無可指責。
She gave him a look of deep reproach after the mistake. 犯錯後，她給了他一個深沈責備的眼神。
Bacteria can reproduce very quickly under the right conditions in the lab. 細菌在實驗室適宜的條件下可以迅速繁殖。
The artist tried to reproduce the vibrant colors of the sunset on canvas. 藝術家試圖在畫布上再現（複製）日落時鮮豔的色彩。
transparencies and other reproducibles 透明膠片和其他可複製品
The term reproducible refers to Something that can be reproduced. 可再現一詞是指可以再現的東西。

meaning: 某物的複製品，如一件藝術品；重複的。
sentences: Jim was proud of the Rembrandt reproduction he owned. 吉姆為他擁有的倫勃朗複製品感到自豪。
The term reproduction refers to a copy of something, as in a piece of art; a duplicate. 「複製品」一詞指的是某物的複製品，如一件藝術品；重複的。
Something described as reproductive is of or relating to reproduction. 被描述為生殖的事物屬於生殖或與生殖有關。
The word reproductive is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 繁殖這個詞常用來形容一個人、一件事或一種情況。
Snakes, lizards, and turtles are all examples of cold-blooded reptiles. 蛇、蜥蜴和烏龜都是冷血爬行動物的例子。
The children enjoyed seeing the variety of reptiles at the local zoo. 孩子們喜歡在當地動物園看各式各樣的爬行動物。
The Republic of China is commonly known as Taiwan worldwide. 中華民國常在國際上被稱為台灣。
The country became a republic after many years of royal rule. 該國在多年的王室統治後成為了一個共和國。
The country has a long-standing republican tradition and values democratic principles. 該國有著悠久的共和傳統，並重視民主原則。
He has been an active member of the local Republican party for many years. 他多年來一直是當地共和黨的活躍成員。

meaning: 傾向引起厭惡或排斥；噁心的。
sentences: The report describes the result as repulsive. 報告稱這項結果令人厭惡。
Everyone noticed the repulsive tone of the message. 每個人都注意到了這條訊息的令人厭惡的語氣。

meaning: 具有良好的聲譽；光榮的。
sentences: She was a reputable businesswoman. 她是一位有信譽的女商人。
Something described as reputable is having a good reputation; honourable. 所謂有信譽的，就是擁有良好的聲譽；尊敬的。
The restaurant has a great reputation for serving fresh and delicious seafood. 這家餐廳以提供新鮮美味的海鮮而享有盛譽（名聲）。
It takes years to build a good reputation but only a few minutes to ruin it. 建立良好的聲譽需要多年時間，但毀掉它只需幾分鐘。
The customer made a request for a refund due to the defect. 顧客因瑕疵提出了退款要求。
I requested a meeting with the manager to discuss the issue. 我請求與經理開會討論該問題。

meaning: 紀念和紀念死者的彌撒（尤其是天主教）。
sentences: The term requiem refers to a Mass (especially Catholic) to honor and remember a dead person. 安魂曲一詞指的是紀念和紀念死者的彌撒（尤其是天主教）。
The lesson introduced requiem as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了安魂曲作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
The job requires at least three years of professional work experience. 這份工作需要至少三年的專業工作經驗。
Applicants must meet all the entry requirements for the university. 申請人必須符合該大學所有的入學要求。

meaning: 要求、必要條件。指必須符合或完成的標準、規定或需求。
sentences: A valid passport is a basic requirement for international travel. 有效護照是國際旅行的基本要求。
Meeting the language requirement is necessary for admission. 符合語言要求是入學的必要條件。

meaning: 必要的、不可缺少的、必要的。
sentences: Please submit the requisite papers before the end of the financial year. 請在財政年度結束前提交必要的文件。
Something described as requisite is essential, indispensable, required. 被描述為必要的東西是必要的、不可缺少的、必要的。

meaning: 首次播出後播放的電視節目，特別是在首次播出後數週播出的電視節目；重複一次。
sentences: I'm not a fan of the new Simpsons episodes, but the old reruns have me in stitches, although I've seen them countless times. 我不喜歡新的《辛普森家庭》劇集，但舊的重播讓我感到緊張，儘管我已經看過無數次了。
The term rerun refers to A television program shown after its initial presentation, particularly many weeks after its initial presentation; a repeat. 「重播」一詞是指在首次播出後播放的電視節目，特別是在首次播出後數週；重複一次。
They bought the contents of the locker for resale. 他們買了儲物櫃裡的東西來轉售。
The resale value was high as the items were quite rare. 由於這些物品相當稀有，轉售價值很高。

meaning: 廢除、廢除或宣告無效；使（諸如規則或合約之類的東西）失效。
sentences: The agency will rescind the policy because many people are dissatisfied with it. 該機構將廢除該政策，因為許多人對此不滿意。
People often rescind when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會撤銷。
The brave firefighters came to the rescue of the family trapped in the fire. 勇敢的消防員前來營救（救援）被困在火災中的那家人。
The helicopter was used to rescue the mountain climbers during the storm. 直升機被用來在風暴中營救登山者。
Medical researchers are working hard to find a cure for the disease. 醫學研究人員正努力尋找治療這種疾病的方法。
I need to do some more research before I decide which laptop to buy. 在決定買哪台筆電之前，我需要做更多的研究（調查）。
He works as a researcher for a global pharmaceutical company. 他在全球製藥公司擔任研究員。
The researchers published their findings in a prestigious scientific journal. 研究人員在一本知名的科學期刊上發表了他們的發現。
There is a striking resemblance between the two sisters, although they are not twins. 這兩姐妹之間有著驚人的相似之處，儘管她們不是雙胞胎。
The movie shows some resemblance to the original novel but has many differences. 這部電影與原著小說有一些相似之處，但有很多不同點。
The twin brothers resemble each other so much that even their parents sometimes confuse them. 這對雙胞胎兄弟長得非常像，甚至連他們的父母有時也會搞混。
The new town hall was designed to resemble the historic building that stood there before. 新的市政廳被設計成與之前屹立在那裡的歷史建築相似。
She began to resent her colleague for always taking credit for her work. 她開始憤恨她的同事總是搶走她的工作功勞。
The new policy caused a lot of resentment among the local community. 新政策引起了當地社區的極大不滿（憤恨）。

meaning: 因相信一個人或一個群體受到他人的冤屈或背叛而產生的憤怒或不滿；憤慨。
sentences: The term resentment refers to anger or displeasure stemming from belief that one or one's group has been wronged or betrayed by others; indignation. 怨恨一詞是指由於相信一個人或一個群體受到他人的冤屈或背叛而產生的憤怒或不滿；憤慨。
The lesson introduced resentment as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了怨恨這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
I'd like to make a dinner reservation for four people at seven o'clock tonight. 我想預訂今晚七點四個人的晚餐位置。
She has some reservations about the new plan and thinks we should reconsider it. 她對這項新計畫有些保留意見，並認為我們應該重新考慮。
I'd like to reserve a table for two for dinner tonight, please. 我想預訂今晚兩人的晚餐桌位。
The national park is a nature reserve for various exotic birds. 國家公園是多種稀有鳥類的自然保護區（預留地）。
The city's water supply comes from a large reservoir located in the mountains. 該市的供水來自位於山區的一個大水庫。
He has a vast reservoir of knowledge and experience in the field of history. 他在歷史領域有著豐富的知識和經驗儲備（積累）。
Mia wrote down reset with the note "重置". Mia把 reset 記下來，並註記「重置」。
We practiced using reset in two different sentences. 我們練習把 reset 放進兩個不同句子裡。

meaning: 將一群人運送到新的定居點。
sentences: The term resettlement refers to the transportation of a group of people to a new settlement. 移民一詞是指將一群人運送到新的定居點。
The lesson introduced resettlement as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了移民安置這個易於理解的有用術語。
People often reshuffle when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們經常會進行重新調整。
Learning when to reshuffle helps you communicate more clearly. 了解何時重新安排可以幫助您更清晰地溝通。
The billionaire decided to reside in a magnificent mansion overlooking the sea. 這位億萬富翁決定住在一座俯瞰大海的壯麗豪宅中。
The final decision on the project's future resides with the manager. 該專案未來的最終決定權歸於（屬於）經理。
The official residence of the Prime Minister is located in the city center. 首相的官邸（住所）位於市中心。
Please provide proof of residence, such as a utility bill, for your application. 請提供居住證明（如水電費單）以供申請使用。

meaning: 通常在特定場地表演的音樂藝術家的位置。
sentences: The trance DJ was keen to secure a residency in Ibiza. 這位 trance DJ 渴望在伊維薩島獲得居住權。
The term residency refers to the position of a musical artist who commonly performs at a particular venue. 駐場一詞是指通常在特定場地表演的音樂藝術家的位置。
Local residents are concerned about the impact of the new project on the environment. 當地居民擔心新專案對環境的影響。
She is a senior resident at the hospital and specializes in heart surgery. 她是醫院的高級住院醫師，專攻心臟外科。
They moved to a quiet residential area in the suburbs to raise their children. 他們搬到郊區一個安靜的住宅區撫養孩子。
The building was originally for industrial use but has been converted into residential units. 該建築原為工業用途，現已改建為住宅單元。

meaning: 屬於、關於或作為殘留物保留的；剩下的。
sentences: Something described as residual is of, relating to, or remaining as a residue; left over. 被描述為殘留物的東西是殘留物的、與殘留物相關的或作為殘留物保留的；剩下的。
The word residual is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 「殘差」這個字常用來描述人、事物或情況。

meaning: 移除或消除其他元素後仍存在或保留的內容。
sentences: The term residue refers to that which persists or remains following the removal or elimination of other elements. 術語殘留物是指在去除或消除其他元素後持續存在或保留的殘留物。
The lesson introduced residue as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了殘留物作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
After working for the company for ten years, he decided to resign and start his own business. 在這家公司工作十年後，他決定辭職並開始自己的事業。
The coach was forced to resign after the team's poor performance this season. 在球隊本賽季表現不佳後，教練被迫辭職。
The manager accepted her resignation and wished her luck in her future career. 經理接受了她的辭職，並祝她未來的事業好運。
He handed in his letter of resignation this morning after finding a better job. 在找到更好的工作後，他今天早上提交了辭職信。

meaning: 材料受拉伸或變形後能恢復形狀的物理性質；彈性。
sentences: The term resilience refers to the physical property of material that can resume its shape after being stretched or deformed; elasticity. 術語「彈性」是指材料在被拉伸或變形後能夠恢復其形狀的物理性能；彈性。
The lesson introduced resilience as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了彈性這個術語，它是一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 受力後迅速恢復原狀；鬆緊帶。變形時具有吸收能量的能力。
sentences: Something described as resilient is returning quickly to original shape after force is applied; elastic. Having the ability to absorb energy when deformed. 被描述為有彈性的東西在施加力後迅速恢復到原來的形狀；鬆緊帶。具有變形時吸收能量的能力。
The word resilient is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 「彈性」一詞通常用於描述人、事物或情況。

meaning: 具有相似性質的任何合成化合物。
sentences: The artist used synthetic resin in her sculptures. 這位藝術家在她的雕塑中使用了合成樹脂。
The term resin refers to any synthetic compound of similar properties. 術語“樹脂”是指具有類似性質的任何合成化合物。
It's hard to resist the temptation of delicious chocolate cake. 很難抵抗美味巧克力蛋糕的誘惑。
The brave people managed to resist the invasion of the enemy. 勇敢的人民設法抵抗了敵人的入侵。
The proposed new tax met with a lot of resistance from the local community. 擬議中的新稅收遭到了當地社區的強烈抵制（反抗）。
Regular exercise can help improve your body's resistance to various diseases. 定期運動可以幫助提高身體對各種疾病的抵抗力。
The new phone is water-resistant and can be used in the rain safely. 這款新手機是防水的（防...的），可以在雨中安全使用。
Some bacteria have become resistant to traditional antibiotics recently. 某些細菌對傳統抗生素已產生了抗藥性（抵抗力）。
He was resolute in his decision to start his own business. 他對於創立自己的事業這一決定非常堅決。
She faced the challenge with a resolute attitude. 她以果斷的態度迎接挑戰。
I made a New Year's resolution to exercise more and eat healthier food. 我下了一個新年決心，要多運動並吃得更健康。
The high-resolution screen provides a very clear and sharp image. 高解析度的螢幕提供了非常清晰銳利的影像。
We need to find a peaceful way to resolve the conflict between the two countries. 我們需要找到一種和平的方式來解決這兩個國家之間的衝突。
She resolved to work harder next semester to improve her grades. 她下定決心下學期要更加努力工作，以提高成績。

meaning: 引起聯想或強烈情感的事物；引起共鳴的東西。
sentences: emotional resonance 情感共鳴
The term resonance refers to something that evokes an association, or a strong emotion; something that strikes a chord. 共鳴這個詞是指能夠引起聯想或強烈情感的事物。引起共鳴的事物。
From across the valley came the resonant sound of a distant church bell. 山谷對面傳來遠處教堂鐘聲的洪亮聲。
strike a resonant note 引起共鳴

meaning: 產生效果或影響；影響；以獲得支持。
sentences: His words resonated with the crowd. 他的話引起了人群的共鳴。
To resonate means to have an effect or impact; to influence; to engender support. 產生共鳴意味著產生效果或影響；影響；以獲得支持。
We spent our summer vacation at a beautiful seaside resort in southern France. 我們在法國南部一個美麗的海濱渡假勝地度過了暑假。
The government decided to resort to military action after failed negotiations. 政府在談判失敗後決定訴諸武力（軍事行動）。
The internet is a vast resource of information on various topics. 互聯網是關於各種主題的龐大資訊資源。
Solar and wind power are important sources of renewable resources. 太陽能與風能是可再生資源的重要來源。

meaning: 有能力或聰明；能夠有效或巧妙地利用可用資源；明智或有效地使用手邊的材料。
sentences: With a resourceful use of space and a fresh coat of paint, the room became a pleasant library with a comfortable seating area. 透過對空間的充分利用和新鮮的油漆，房間變成了一個令人愉快的圖書館，並設有舒適的休息區。

Something described as resourceful is capable or clever; able to put available resources to efficient or ingenious use; using materials at hand wisely or efficiently. 被描述為足智多謀的事物是有能力或聰明的；能夠有效或巧妙地利用可用資源；明智或有效地使用手頭上的材料。
It's important to treat everyone with respect and dignity. 尊重並有尊嚴地對待每個人是很重要的。
He is highly respected for his dedication to his profession. 他因其對專業的奉獻而深受尊敬。

meaning: 值得尊敬的、體面的、相當大的
sentences: He comes from a very respectable family and has a high social status. 他出身於一個非常受人尊敬的家庭，擁有很高的社會地位。
She earned a respectable amount of money through her part-time job. 她透過兼職工作賺到了一筆相當可觀（體面）的錢。
The students were very respectful to the guest speaker during the lecture. 講座期間，學生們對客座演講者非常恭敬。
It is important to maintain a respectful tone when communicating with colleagues. 與同事溝通時，保持尊重的語氣非常重要。
The two colleagues returned to their respective offices after the meeting. 兩位同事在會議結束後回到了各自的辦公室。
The players were praised for their respective contributions to the team. 球員們因各自對球隊的貢獻而受到稱讚。

meaning: 以相對的方式；在比較數組列表時經常使用，該術語表示列表中的項目按照給定的順序相互對應。
sentences: Serena Williams and Roger Federer won the women's and men's singles titles, respectively, at the 2010 Australian Open. 小威廉斯和羅傑費德勒在 2010 年澳大利亞網球公開賽上分別贏得了女子和男子單打冠軍。
The 49th and 50th states of the United States of America are Alaska and Hawaii, respectively. 美利堅合眾國的第 49 個州和第 50 個州分別是阿拉斯加州和夏威夷州。

meaning: 與呼吸或呼吸器官有關；呼吸。
sentences: Something described as respiratory is relating to respiration or the organs of respiration; breathing. 被描述為呼吸的事物與呼吸或呼吸器官有關；呼吸。
The word respiratory is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 呼吸這個詞常用來描述人、事物或情況。
The term respite refers to a brief interval of rest or relief. 喘息一詞是指短暫的休息或緩解。
The lesson introduced respite as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「休息」這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
The patient is responding well to the new medical treatment. 病人對新療法反應良好。
How did the manager respond to your new project proposal? 經理對你的新專案提案有什麼回應？
Most of the respondents to the survey expressed satisfaction with the service. 大多數調查受訪者對服務表示滿意。
The respondent denied all the allegations made against him during the trial. 被告在審判期間否認了針對他的所有指控。

meaning: 回應緊急情況或其他召喚的人。
sentences: 911 responders arrived at the scene within five minutes after the call. 接到電話後五分鐘內，911 急救人員就趕到現場了。
The term responder refers to A person who responds to an emergency situation or other summons. 響應者一詞是指響應緊急情況或其他召喚的人。
We are waiting for a formal response to our new proposal. 我們正等待對我們新提案的正式回覆。
The patient is showing a positive response to the new treatment. 病人對新療法表現出積極的反應。
As a citizen, it is your responsibility to follow the law. 作為一名公民，遵守法律是妳的責任。
The manager accepted full responsibility for the project's failure. 經理承擔了專案失敗的全部責任。
As an adult, you are responsible for your own actions and choices. 作為一名成年人，你要為自己的行為與選擇負責。
Who is responsible for managing the marketing department? 誰負責管理行銷部門？
Something described as responsive is suited to something else; correspondent. 被描述為響應式的東西適合於其他東西；通訊員。
The word responsive is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 「響應式」一詞通常用於描述人、事物或情況。

meaning: 機器適應外部影響的能力。
sentences: The responsiveness of my old PC is nearly zero! 我的舊電腦的反應幾乎為零！
The term responsiveness refers to The ability of a machine to adjust to external influences. 術語「響應能力」是指機器適應外部影響的能力。
The company is known for its responsiveness to customer feedback. 該公司以其對客戶反饋的及時反應而聞名。
The website's responsiveness on mobile devices is excellent. 該網站在移動設備上的響應速度非常出色。
You look very tired; you should take a short rest. 你看起來很累，應該短暫休息一下。
The rest of the students will arrive later this afternoon. 其餘的學生將在今天下午晚些時候到達。
After the restart of my browser, the problem went away. 重新啟動瀏覽器後，問題就消失了。
The term restart refers to the act of starting something again. 術語「重新啟動」是指重新開始某件事的行為。
We went to a fancy Italian restaurant to celebrate our anniversary. 我們去了一家高級義大利餐廳慶祝我們的週年紀念日。
The service at this restaurant is excellent and the food is delicious. 這家餐廳的服務非常好，食物也很美味。

meaning: 返回或恢復先前的狀況或位置。
sentences: the restitution of an elastic body 彈性體的恢復
The term restitution refers to a return or restoration to a previous condition or position. 「恢復原狀」一詞是指返回或恢復到先前的狀況或位置。
The night before his wedding was a restless one. 婚禮的前一天晚上是一個不安的夜晚。
The report describes the result as restless. 報告稱這項結果令人不安。

meaning: 焦躁不安的狀態或狀況；無法保持靜止、安靜、平靜或舒適。
sentences: She sat and fidgeted out of restlessness as she waited. 她坐著等待，坐立不安，坐立不安。
The term restlessness refers to The state or condition of being restless; an inability to be still, quiet, at peace or comfortable. 不安一詞是指不安的狀態或狀況；無法保持靜止、安靜、平靜或舒適。
The restoration of the historic cathedral took several years to complete. 這座歷史悠久的大教堂的修復工作花了好幾年才完成。
The project aims to facilitate the restoration of the local wildlife habitat. 該專案旨在促進當地野生動物棲息地的恢復（修復）。
After a long day working in the fields Clarence took comfort in a restorative pint of beer. 在田裡勞動了一整天后，克拉倫斯喝了一品脫啤酒以恢復體力。
The report describes the result as restorative. 報告稱此結果具有恢復性。
The old palace was carefully restored to its original beauty last year. 這座舊宮殿去年被仔細修復，恢復了原本的美麗。
We hope to restore peace and order in the region as soon as possible. 我們希望盡快恢復該地區的和平與秩序。
He had to restrain himself from shouting during the heated argument. 在激烈爭論中，他不得不克制（抑制）自己不要大叫。
The dog needed to be restrained by a leash during the walk in the park. 散步在公園時，這隻狗需要用皮帶管束（束縛）住。

meaning: 被抑制、被限制、被控製或被控制。
sentences: He greeted her for the first time in three years with a restrained embrace. 三年來，他第一次用克制的擁抱來迎接她。
The report describes the result as restrained. 報告稱這一結果是有限的。
The government showed great restraint in its response to the protest. 政府在應對抗議活動時展現了極大的克制。
The tight budget is a major restraint on the development of the project. 緊縮的預算是專案發展的一個主要束縛（限制）。
The government decided to restrict the usage of single-use plastic. 政府決定限制一次性塑料的使用。
Parking is restricted to residents only in this particular area. 這一帶僅限居民停車（受限）。
The government imposed strict travel restrictions during the pandemic. 政府在疫情期間實施了嚴格的旅行限制。
There are some age restrictions on watching certain types of movies in the cinema. 在電影院觀看某些類型的電影有一些年齡限制。

meaning: 限制、限制、包含在規定的範圍內。
sentences: Something described as restrictive is confining, limiting, containing within defined bounds. 被描述為限制性的東西是限制、限制、包含在規定的範圍內。
The word restrictive is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 限制性一詞通常用於描述人、事物或情況。
Excuse me, where is the nearest public restroom located? 抱歉，請問最近的公廁在哪裡？
She is cleaning the restroom with some strong disinfectant. 她正在用一些強效消毒劑清潔廁所。
The final result of the experiment was quite surprising to everyone. 實驗的最終結果讓每個人都感到非常驚訝。
His success is the result of years of hard work and dedication. 他的成功是多年努力與奉獻的結果。

meaning: 作為某事的結果或結果而遵循；結果。
sentences: Something described as resultant is following as a result or consequence of something; resulting. 被描述為結果的事物是作為某事的結果或後果而發生的；由此產生。
The word resultant is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 結果這個詞常用來描述一個人、一個事物或一個情境。

meaning: 遵循 作為其他事物的 結果; 。
sentences: After the flood, the resulting epidemics killed even more. 洪水過後， 由此引發 的流行病導致更多人死亡。 洪水過後，引發的流行病導致更多人死亡。 洪水過後，由此引發了流行病導致更多人死亡。
The report describes the result as resulting. 報告描述了結果。 報告描述了結果。 報告描述了結果。
Please send your updated resume to the human resources department by Friday. 請在週五前將更新後的履歷寄給人事部門。
The match will resume after the rain stops and the ground is dry. 雨停且場地乾燥後，比賽將重新開始。

meaning: 重新開始或重新開始某事的行為。
sentences: The term resumption refers to the act of resuming or starting something again. 恢復一詞是指恢復或重新開始某事的行為。
The lesson introduced resumption as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「恢復」作為一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 某復興的例子；活力或活力的更新。
sentences: The term resurgence refers to an instance of something resurging; a renewal of vigor or vitality. 「復興」一詞指的是某種事物重新興起的例子。活力或活力的更新。
The lesson introduced resurgence as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「復興」這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 從死裡復活；使生命恢復。
sentences: To resurrect means to raise from the dead; to bring life back to. 復活的意思是從死裡復活；讓生命恢復。
People may resurrect in different situations depending on the context. 根據環境的不同，人們可能會在不同的情況下復活。

meaning: 奇蹟般的捲土重來或復興（例如電視劇）；從可怕的困境中恢復過來。
sentences: The term resurrection refers to a miraculous comeback or revival (e.g., of a TV series); recovery from a dire predicament. 「復活」一詞指的是奇蹟般的捲土重來或復興（例如電視劇）；從可怕的困境中恢復過來。
The lesson introduced resurrection as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了「復活」這個術語，它是一個值得理解的有用術語。
The company is planning to expand its retail business by opening new stores. 公司計畫透過開設新店來擴大其零售業務。
The suggested retail price of the new smartphone is about five hundred dollars. 這款新智慧型手機的建議零售價約為五百美元。
The term retailer refers to a retail sales company or salesman. 零售商一詞是指零售公司或推銷員。
The lesson introduced retailer as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了零售商這個易於理解的有用術語。
The company managed to retain most of its customers despite the price increase. 儘管價格上漲，公司仍設法留住了（保持）大部分客戶。
She has a remarkable memory and can retain a large amount of information. 她有著非凡的記憶力，可以記住（保留）大量的資訊。

meaning: 為預留另一方服務時間而支付的費用。
sentences: This lawyer charges a retainer for his work. 這位律師為其工作收取聘用費。
The term retainer refers to a fee one pays to reserve the other's time for services. 保留費一詞是指一方為保留另一方的服務時間而支付的費用。
The army tried repeatedly to retake the fort they had been driven from. 軍隊多次試圖奪回被他們趕走的堡壘。
To retake means to capture or occupy somewhere again. 奪回意味著再次佔領或佔領某處。

meaning: 對傷害或感知到的不公正行為採取暴力或其他懲罰性反應；反擊；復仇。
sentences: The term retaliation refers to violent or otherwise punitive response to an act of harm or perceived injustice; a hitting back; revenge. 報復一詞是指對傷害或認為不公正的行為採取暴力或其他懲罰性反應；反擊；復仇。
The lesson introduced retaliation as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了報復這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 與報復有關或屬於報復的一部分。
sentences: The hostile forces were at an impasse; neither could attack with enough force and still defend against the retaliatory counterattack. 敵對勢力陷入僵局。雙方都無法以足夠的力量進攻並仍然抵禦報復性反擊。
The report describes the result as retaliatory. 報告稱這項結果是報復性的。

meaning: 繼續拖延；繼續阻礙；以阻止進展。
sentences: retard the march of an army 阻礙軍隊行軍
retard the motion of a ship 減慢船舶的運動

meaning: 延遲;發展遲緩、受阻；受阻。
sentences: This kind of plant is usually of a retarded growth. 這種植物通常生長緩慢。
The report describes the result as retarded. 報告稱這一結果是滯後的。

meaning: 故事的新的、更改的或改編的版本。
sentences: The new film is a needless retelling of what was already a cinematic classic. 這部新電影毫無必要地重述了已經成為電影經典的內容。
The term retelling refers to A new, changed, or adapted version of a story. 術語「重述」是指故事的新版本、更改版本或改編版本。

meaning: 記憶;腦海中保留著什麼。
sentences: The term retention refers to memory; what is retained in the mind. 術語「保留」是指記憶力。記在心裡的是什麼。
The lesson introduced retention as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了保留作為一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 重新思考某件事，意圖改變或取代它。
sentences: Disability rights advocates are encouraging people to rethink the words "crazy" and "insane" as they stigmatize mental health. 殘疾人權利倡導者鼓勵人們重新思考「瘋狂」和「瘋狂」這兩個詞，因為它們侮辱了心理健康。
To rethink means to think again about something, with the intention of changing or replacing it. 重新思考意味著重新思考某件事，意圖改變或取代它。
The retina is a layer of tissue at the back of the eye that senses light. 視網膜是眼睛後部感光的一層組織。
The doctor performed a test to check the health of his retina. 醫生進行了測試以檢查他視網膜的健康狀況。
Something described as retinal is of or pertaining to the retina. 被描述為視網膜的東西屬於或屬於視網膜。
The word retinal is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 視網膜這個詞常用來描述人、事物或情況。
